'''''Plague''''' was a standard [[Marauder-class Assault Corvette/Legends|''Marauder''-class corvette]].

Owned by a mercenary group which operated out of the former [[Azzameen family]] [[Azzameen Station/Legends|space station]], the ''Plague'' was destroyed by a strike force consisting of [[Emon Azzameen]], [[Aeron Azzameen]], and elements of the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]], including [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]]. ''Plague'' and its accompanying [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] were not successful in defending the mercenary position, and the base was retaken by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]].

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Plague'' was featured in the [[1999]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''. The [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was also mentioned in the game's [[Prima Games]] [[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|guide]], where the ''Marauder''-class corvette's name is misspelled as ''Plaque''.
